title: polygala corralitae
intro: Polygala corralitae, also known as Mexican milkwort or bee balm, is a perennial plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polygala corralitae are numerous, as it has been used to treat various conditions such as respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Polygala corralitae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically for its medicinal benefits.
